Appearances:
Plaintiff AP SF 610 Leavenworth, LLC is present. Represented by Susan Lee Chew.
Attorney David Wasserman appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Jacob Kanduch is present.
Attorney Peter Chess representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Ernst Halperin, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of MAR-19-2012 is vacated.
